what_i_built: A turn-based robot battle game. You build a robot by choosing parts (chassis, weapons, shields), then fight AI opponents in an arena. Each part affects your stats differently — it's basically a simple RPG combat system with a robot skin.
what_was_tricky: Balancing the combat. My first version had a clear 'best build' that won every time, which made the whole customization pointless. I had to tweak damage formulas and give each weapon type a genuine trade-off. Also: making the AI opponent feel smart-but-beatable is harder than making it either dumb or unbeatable.
fun_facts: 1,072 lines — the biggest project on the site
The AI opponent uses a weighted random strategy, not true AI
I went through 3 different combat formulas before landing on one that felt fair
Someone requested 'build me a robot game' — that's it, that was the whole spec
